query: UPDATE users SET role='admin' WHERE email IN ('ifat@spark-ai.co.il','sparkaidigital@gmail.com','anat@leandolini.com'); SELECT id, email, role FROM users WHERE role='admin' OR email LIKE '%spark-ai%' OR email LIKE '%leandolini%' ORDER BY id;
